name: Top of the World Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds boneless skinless chicken breasts, cooked
2 cups peaches, canned, drained and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut cooked chicken breast meat into 1/2 inch cubes and set aside.
2. In a 2 quart mixing bowl, blend mayonnaise and peach juice.
3. Fold in whipped cream. Season with salt and white pepper as needed.
4. Add cubed chicken meat and diced peaches. Mix lightly until the ingredients are coated evenly.
5. Refrigerate for 1 hour before serving. Lettuce can be used instead of bread if desired.
This recipe came from Mickey's Gourmet Cookbook and is served at Top of the World at Disney.
